reference: Hi, I am seven weeks pregnant and I have been experiencing some intermittent spotting. The first time I bled, I went to the hospital, and they told me the baby was fine. I am now having the same issue; however, the bleeding is heavier, although it is still light pink. Am I at risk of losing my baby? I am also experiencing light cramps.
text: Hi, I am 7 weeks pregnant and I have been experiencing some intermittent spotting. The first time I bled, I went to the hospital and they told me the baby was fine and now having the same issue. However, the bleeding is heavier although it is still light pink. Am I at risk of losing my baby? I am also experiencing light pink.
